createDeployment.name: deployment_create
createDeployment.description: Deploy a BPMN or DMN artifact to Operaton. Upload process definitions, DMN tables, or CMMN cases. Returns deployment ID and resource names on success.
examples: Deploy loan-approval.bpmn to the default engine

getProcessDefinitions.name: processDefinition_list
getProcessDefinitions.description: List deployed process definitions. Filter by key, name, version, category, or tenant to find specific definitions. Returns key, id, version, and deployment info.
examples: List all versions of 'loan-approval' process definition

getProcessDefinition.name: processDefinition_getById
getProcessDefinition.description: Retrieve a single process definition by its unique ID. Returns full metadata including key, version, deployment ID, and tenant.

getProcessDefinitionsCount.name: processDefinition_count
getProcessDefinitionsCount.description: Count deployed process definitions matching filter criteria. Useful for pagination planning before listing.

deleteProcessDefinition.name: processDefinition_deleteById
deleteProcessDefinition.description: Delete a process definition by ID. Use cascade=true to also remove running instances, history, and dependent resources.

getTasks.name: task_list
getTasks.description: Query user tasks with rich filtering: by assignee, candidate group, process instance, variables, due date, and more. Returns task metadata for operator review.
examples: Find all unassigned tasks in the 'loan-review' process

getTask.name: task_getById
getTask.description: Retrieve a single user task by its ID. Returns task name, assignee, due date, priority, and associated process instance.

getTasksCount.name: task_count
getTasksCount.description: Count user tasks matching filter criteria. Supports same filters as task list. Useful for workload sizing.

getIncidents.name: incident_list
getIncidents.description: List active incidents across the engine. Filter by type, message, process definition, or activity. Incidents indicate failed jobs, failed scripts, or custom conditions.
examples: List all failedJob incidents for process key 'loan-approval'

getIncident.name: incident_getById
getIncident.description: Retrieve a single incident by its ID. Returns incident type, message, cause, root cause, process definition ID, and activity ID.

getIncidentsCount.name: incident_count
getIncidentsCount.description: Count active incidents matching filter criteria. Use to gauge operational health before investigating individual incidents.
